accurate.why: All claims match the bill text; the description of trust arrangement and gaming prohibition is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all references to tracts and legal authority match the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the purpose is transferring lands into trust for the Winnebago Tribe.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes the trust holding and reservation declaration.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the gaming prohibition and valid existing rights condition.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all three tracts, trust holding, reservation status, gaming prohibition.

concise.why: Appropriately concise without omitting key elements.

correct_entities.why: Army Corps of Engineers, Bureau of Indian Affairs, Winnebago Tribe, and Indian Gaming Regulatory Act all correct.

correct_figures.why: 1865 treaty and September 20, 2024 approval date—wait, bill says July 12, 2024 for 118-hr-1240. Summary says July 12, 2024 which matches.
